item.title: RSAC 2026 Recap: From AI Hype to Real SaaS Security Outcomes
item.description: A clear trend at RSAC 2026: SaaS supply chain attacks are rising fast with the adoption of AI agents. Learn more from this year's conference.

item.title: Mapping TTPs to SaaS Supply Chain Attacks: Recent SaaS Breaches
item.description: Discover how attackers exploit the SaaS supply chain using MITRE ATT&CK techniques. Learn why deep SaaS security visibility matters.

item.title: Setting a SaaS Security Baseline: Why the CSA’s New SaaS Security Capability Framework (SSCF) Matters
item.description: Explore the CSA’s new SaaS Security Capability Framework (SSCF) and how it helps enterprises reduce risk, standardize controls, and stop SaaS attacks.

item.title: How AppOmni Closes the Gaps in SaaS Security Posture
item.description: Read on the basics of security posture, why it matters for your organization, and how AppOmni is the right SaaS security solution for a protected SaaS environment.

item.title: How New Supply Chain Attacks Challenge SaaS Security: Lessons from UNC6395 and UNC6040 (ShinyHunters)
item.description: Attackers like UNC6395 and UNC6040 expose SaaS supply chain risks. Learn how stolen OAuth tokens bypass security—and how to protect your data.

item.title: Zero Trust Needs a Bridge: How to Unlock Shared Signals for SaaS Now
item.description: Discover how AppOmni’s Zero Trust Bridge enables shared signals in SaaS, turning apps into real-time risk detectors. Learn how to close gaps in Zero Trust security.

item.title: Salesloft Drift–Salesforce Breach (UNC6395): Why Salesforce OAuth Integrations are a Growing Risk
item.description: The Salesloft Drift Salesforce breach by UNC6395 exploited OAuth tokens to steal data. Learn what happened and how to prevent future SaaS attacks.

item.title: SaaS Identity Threat Detection: How Can You Spot Hidden SaaS Risks and Shadow AI Before They Cause Damage?
item.description: Discover how SaaS identity threat detection helps uncover risks from forgotten test users and AI accounts. Learn how to connect app, identity, and behavior data to protect your SaaS stack.

item.title: How Can You Stop SaaS Privilege Escalation Fast with Real-Time Detection & Automatic Containment?
item.description: Discover how to stop SaaS privilege escalation instantly with real-time detection and automatic containment.

item.title: AppOmni Is Now Available in All Major Cloud Marketplaces
item.description: Read the latest update on AppOmni being in all three major cloud marketplaces: AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. Learn what this means for our future customers.

item.title: SaaS-Aware Identity Threat Detection and Response (ITDR): Bringing SaaS Awareness to ITDR Solutions
item.description: Enhance traditional ITDR solutions with the insights and context needed for SaaS application specific events and posture settings.

item.title: AppOmni at RSAC 2026: Details to Know Before You Go
item.description: AppOmni shares RSA Conference 2026 insights to improve SaaS and AI security.

item.title: ShinyHunters Claims Woflow Breach: What It Means for SaaS Supply Chain Security
item.description: Learn the security risks in SaaS supply chains and about ShinyHunters’ evolving extortion tactics behind the alleged Woflow breach.

item.title: What is Session Hijacking?
item.description: Discover how session hijacking targets SaaS apps, why traditional defenses fall short, and best practices to prevent, detect, and respond.

item.title: What is Session Hijacking?
item.description: Discover how session hijacking targets SaaS apps, why traditional defenses fall short, and best practices to prevent, detect, and respond.

item.title: Why SaaS Is the New Attack Surface—and How AppOmni Is Defending It at Black Hat
item.description: Heading to Black Hat 2025? Discover AppOmni’s featured session on AI & SaaS security, booth #2064 activities, and exclusive happy hour details. Learn how leading enterprises are securing SaaS and AI apps against modern threats.

item.title: Achieving CISA BOD 25-01 Compliance and SCuBA Alignment
item.description: Read the blog to learn about CISA's Secure Cloud Based Applications (SCuBA) and BOD 25-01 compliance with the help of AppOmni’s SaaS security platform, updated for M365 SCuBA compliance checks.

item.title: Pentests Often Miss 6 Critical Saas Security Issues. Here’s Why.
item.description: Understand the reasons why intermittent, manual penetration tests create loopholes for security teams when handling SaaS security within extensive deployments.

item.title: What 2024’s SaaS Breaches Mean for 2025 Cybersecurity
item.description: In this blog, we take a look at the most impactful SaaS security incidents in 2024 and share SaaS security predictions for 2025.

item.title: What SaaS Security ROI Looks Like in Practice
item.description: Security buyers need proof, not promises. Learn why AppOmni created a SaaS security ROI report and what customer insights reveal about SaaS risks, audits, and operational efficiency for customers.

item.title: See SaaS the Way Your SIEM Sees Cloud: AppOmni Now in the Datadog Marketplace
item.description: AppOmni’s new Datadog integration eliminates SaaS visibility gaps by bringing SaaS security signals into Datadog Cloud SIEM, giving security teams a unified view across cloud and SaaS without the SaaS blind spots.

item.title: Simplify SaaS Security: How Posture Scoring Empowers Teams to Optimize SSPM
item.description: Learn about AppOmni’s new Posture Scoring which simplifies SaaS security management using a clear, actionable 0-100 scoring scale.

item.title: ServiceNow Agentic AI: What It Means for CISOs, SOC Analysts, SaaS Admins, and Developers
item.description: Learn how agentic AI expands ServiceNow’s attack surface and impacts CISOs, InfoSec, SOC, IT, admins, and developers, making AI security a critical priority.

item.title: AppOmni Expands AI Security with Agentic AI Security for ServiceNow
item.description: Defend your ServiceNow AI environment with AppOmni AgentGuard. Stop prompt attacks, prevent data exfiltration, and gain real-time control against emerging AI agent threats.

item.title: Why Frost & Sullivan named AppOmni a Growth & Innovation Leader in the 2025 Frost Radar™ for SSPM
item.description: Frost & Sullivan recognized AppOmni as a 2025 Growth & Innovation Leader for redefining SaaS security with AI, Zero Trust, and deep application insight.

item.title: AppOmni Awarded the 2025 Frost & Sullivan Technology Innovation Leadership Recognition
item.description: Frost & Sullivan honors AppOmni with its 2025 Technology Innovation Leadership Award for excellence in SaaS Security Posture Management. Learn how AppOmni leads the SSPM market.

item.title: The SaaS Visibility Trap: Why Seeing SaaS Risk Isn’t the Same as Securing It
item.description: Discover why SaaS visibility alone isn’t enough for SaaS security. Learn how to avoid the SaaS “visibility trap” and secure your SaaS environment with AppOmni.

item.title: 75% of Orgs. Had a SaaS Security Incident Despite High Confidence in Their Security. Here’s Why.
item.description: Discover why 75% of organizations faced a SaaS security incident despite high confidence, what drives this gap, and how to close it.

item.title: How to Investigate Suspicious User Activity Across Multiple SaaS Applications
item.description: Learn how security teams can investigate cross-SaaS threats, spot real risks, and streamline incident response with consistent, efficient strategies.

item.title: SaaS Security Risks and Mitigation: How to Close Your Security Gaps
item.description: Learn about SaaS security risks and mitigation to close your organizations’ security gaps, and how AppOmni’s SaaS security solution can help.
